title: Google Maps Scraper
description: Scrape Google Maps places, reviews, and business leads. No API keys, no login. Fast HTTP-based scraping with batch keywords × locations, review sentiment, and ready-to-use LinkedIn enrichment. Perfect for lead generation, local SEO research, and competitor intelligence.

keywords.sectionDescription: Define what to search on Google Maps. Use single fields for one search, or use the list fields below for batch mode — all keyword × location combinations run in a single job and results are deduplicated by placeId and googleCid.
keywords.title: 🔍 Keywords
keywords.description: Business type, category, or keyword to search (e.g. 'coffee shops', 'dentists', 'plumbers near me'). Combined with Location to form the search query. Use Keywords List below for batch mode.

location.title: 📍 Location
location.description: Where to search (e.g. 'Austin, TX', 'London, UK', '10001'). Free-text — accepts city, neighborhood, ZIP, or country. Use Locations List below for batch mode. Or use Custom Geolocation below for precise polygon targeting.

keywordsList.title: 📋 Keywords List (Batch Mode)
keywordsList.description: Run many keyword searches in one job. Combined with every entry in Locations List — e.g. ['dentist', 'orthodontist'] × ['Austin, TX', 'Dallas, TX'] = 4 searches, one run. Overrides the single Keywords field when provided.

locationsList.title: 🗺️ Locations List (Batch Mode)
locationsList.description: Multiple locations to search across in batch mode. Cross-multiplied with Keywords List. Leave empty or pass a single country to search broadly.

placeUrls.title: 🔗 Direct Place URLs
placeUrls.description: Skip search and scrape these Google Maps place URLs directly. Useful when you already have a list of businesses from a previous run, a spreadsheet, or the Places API.

customGeolocation.title: 🌐 Custom Geolocation (GeoJSON)
customGeolocation.description: Optional GeoJSON Point or Polygon for precise area targeting. When provided, the scraper searches within the geometry instead of free-text location. Supports { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [lng, lat] } or { "type": "Polygon", "coordinates": [[[lng, lat], ...]] }.

language.sectionDescription: Controls the language and region of Google Maps results.
language.title: 🌐 Language
language.description: Language code for Google Maps (ISO 639-1). Affects place names, categories, and reviews.

countryCode.title: 🏳️ Country Code
countryCode.description: Country code for Google Maps regional bias (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, lowercase).

minRating.sectionDescription: Narrow your results by rating and operational status.
minRating.title: ⭐ Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Only include places with at least this star rating (0 = no filter).

includeClosed.title: 🚫 Include Permanently Closed
includeClosed.description: When disabled, skips places marked permanently or temporarily closed on Google Maps.

maxReviewsPerPlace.sectionDescription: Reviews are billed separately at $0.40 per 1,000 — set to 0 to skip for cheapest runs.
maxReviewsPerPlace.title: 💬 Max Reviews per Place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: How many reviews to extract for each place. Set to 0 to skip reviews entirely. Default 10 balances cost and signal.

includeReviewSentiment.title: 📊 Include Review Sentiment
includeReviewSentiment.description: Adds a simple positive/neutral/negative breakdown based on review star ratings. No LLM cost — adds zero to your bill.

reviewLanguage.title: 🗣️ Review Language
reviewLanguage.description: Language code for reviews (ISO 639-1). Leave as 'en' for English.

enrichContacts.sectionDescription: Turn place listings into full sales leads. Contact enrichment fetches each business website to extract emails and social profile links. Billed as 'result_lead' ($1.50 per 1,000) when it produces data.
enrichContacts.title: 📧 Enrich Contacts (Email + Social Profiles)
enrichContacts.description: When enabled, fetches each place's website and extracts emails, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, and Pinterest profile URLs. Cached per unique website within the run.

enrichLinkedIn.title: 🔗 Enrich with LinkedIn Search URL
enrichLinkedIn.description: Adds a ready-to-use LinkedIn company search URL to each result — feed it straight into labrat011/linkedin-jobs-scraper's companyFilter for full lead pipelines. Free.

outputView.sectionDescription: Choose which slice of the data to push to the dataset.
outputView.title: 📤 Output View
outputView.description: Pre-filter results for common use cases. 'places' returns full place records, 'reviews' focuses on review data, 'leads' returns only contact-ready fields.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control total output and per-search caps.
maxResults.title: 📊 Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum total places to return. Free users capped at 25. Subscribe for up to 10,000.

maxResultsPerSearch.title: 🔢 Max Results Per Search (Batch Mode)
maxResultsPerSearch.description: Cap per keyword/location combination in batch mode. Example: 3 keywords × 2 locations × 20 per search = up to 120 total results.

proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Google Maps blocks most datacenter IPs. Residential proxies are strongly recommended for reliable results at scale.
proxyConfiguration.title: 🔒 Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. RESIDENTIAL group gives the best success rate — without it, Google may serve CAPTCHAs or 429s.
